name: EU AI Act
description: Comprehensive regulation on AI systems in the European Union, establishing risk-based approach with prohibitions, high-risk requirements, and transparency obligations.
keyRequirements: Risk management system for high-risk AI
penalties: Up to €35M or 7% of global turnover

name: California Consumer Privacy Act
description: California law granting consumers rights over their personal information, including right to know, delete, opt-out of sale.

name: California Privacy Rights Act
description: Amendment to CCPA with enhanced consumer rights, sensitive personal information protections, and data minimization requirements.

name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
description: Voluntary framework for managing AI risks across the AI lifecycle, providing guidance for organizations developing and using AI systems.

framework.govern: Organizational AI governance and risk management policies
framework.map: AI system context and impact assessment
framework.measure: AI system performance and impact measurement
framework.manage: Regular monitoring and response to AI risks

name: UK AI Act (Draft)
description: Proposed UK legislation for AI governance focusing on innovation while ensuring safety and public trust in AI systems.
keyRequirements: AI system registration for high-risk applications

name: Artificial Intelligence and Data Act
description: Canadian federal legislation (part of Bill C-27) regulating AI systems and protecting against harm from AI.

name: Algorithmic Recommendation Management Provisions
description: Chinese regulations on algorithmic recommendation services requiring transparency and user control.

name: Model AI Governance Framework
description: Singapore's voluntary framework providing guidance on AI governance and deployment.
